Aethon · Resistance Command · Secure Channel
EMPIRE 2
RISE OF XU
General Vorrakh has occupied Aethon for two decades.
The Xu Dominion controls 11 zones — from the Patrol
Front to their capital, Xumen. The Resistance needs adventurers.
You are one of them.
11 ZONES 8 RACES · 4 CLASSES LV.1–100 CO-OP 4P

ADVENTURERS 1 / 8
XU OUTPOST
ZONE · E2 · HOSTILE TERRITORY
A fortified Xu Dominion outpost on the outer rim of Aethon. Enemy patrols are frequent and the Serpent Titan MK-VII has been sighted in the deep zone. Recommended for adventurers Level 20+.
LOBBY CHAT
All adventurers must ready up · Game starts when countdown reaches 0
